About Us

Tamil Nadu's Most Trusted Home Health Care

Green Life Home Health Care is Chennai's premier home nursing service, bringing hospital-grade care to your doorstep. Based in Perambur, we serve families across Tamil Nadu with compassion, professionalism, and round-the-clock support.

🏥
Qualified Nurses & Doctors
🕐
24/7 Emergency Response
📋

🤝
Family-Centred Approach

Our Services

Comprehensive Home Healthcare

Professional care tailored to your needs — all delivered at home across Chennai.

💉
Home Nursing Care
Certified nurses for wound dressing, IV care, medication, catheter care and daily monitoring at home.
Wound CareIV TherapyMonitoring
Enquire Now
Popular
🦴
Physiotherapy at Home
Expert physiotherapy for stroke recovery, orthopaedic rehab, and mobility restoration in the comfort of your home.
Stroke RehabOrthoMobility
Enquire Now
🩹
Post Operative Care
Safe and smooth recovery after surgery with professional wound care, medication management, and follow-up monitoring.
Surgery RecoveryDressing
Enquire Now
👴
Elderly & Geriatric Care
Dedicated day/night care for senior citizens — bathing, grooming, feeding, fall prevention and companionship.
Day CareNight CareCompanionship
Enquire Now
👶
Pediatric & Child Care
Gentle, expert nursing care for newborns, infants, and children — with doctor home visits and vaccinations.
NewbornDoctor VisitVaccination
Enquire Now
🏥
ICU Setup at Home
Complete ICU-grade equipment — monitors, ventilators, oxygen concentrators — managed 24/7 by critical care nurses.
VentilatorCritical Care24/7
Enquire Now
🌿
Doctor Home Visits
Qualified doctors visit your home for consultation, diagnosis, prescription, and treatment — no hospital trips needed.
ConsultationPrescriptionDiagnosis
Enquire Now
🤱
Mother & Child Care
Post-delivery nursing care for mother and newborn — breastfeeding support, baby bath, postnatal recovery assistance.
PostnatalNewbornBreastfeeding
Enquire Now
🕊️
Palliative Care
Comfort-focused care for serious illness — pain management, emotional support, and family guidance with dignity.
Pain ReliefCancer CareComfort

Why Choose Us

Why Families Trust Us

We combine clinical excellence with the warmth of home — making recovery comfortable and families confident.

🏅
Certified, Background-Verified Nurses
Every nurse is medically qualified, ID-verified, and trained in home care protocols and patient safety.
🕐
24/7 Emergency Availability
Our care team is available round the clock — call anytime for urgent medical assistance at home.
📋
Personalised Treatment Plans
Each patient receives a custom care plan designed with their doctor's guidance and family's input.
💚
Tamil Nadu's Local Experts
We understand the local culture, language, and patient preferences — care that truly feels like family.
Testimonials

What Our Families Say

"The nurses from Green Life were incredibly caring with my father after his hip replacement. They came on time, handled everything professionally. We felt safe and supported throughout his recovery."
R
Rajeshwari S.
Perambur, Chennai
"After my mother's stroke, we needed daily physiotherapy and nursing. Green Life provided excellent service — the therapist explained everything in Tamil which made my mother so comfortable."
M
Murugan K.
Kolathur, Chennai
"We used Green Life for ICU setup at home for our grandfather. The critical care nurse was highly skilled and calm in every situation. Truly hospital-quality care at our home in Chennai."
P
Priya T.
Madurai
"Booked a doctor home visit for my elderly amma — the doctor arrived within 2 hours, diagnosed her properly and gave medicines. No need to struggle with hospital queues. Amazing service!"
V
Venkatesh A.
Coimbatore
"The post-delivery care for my wife and baby was exceptional. The nurse was gentle, patient, and guided us on newborn care step by step. Highly recommend to every new parent in Chennai."
S
Suresh D.
Perambur, Chennai
